## What version

- [ ] `v1.0` (stable) — bug fix or doc-only change, no schema break
- [ ] `v1.3-preview` (preview) — additive schema change
- [ ] `vNext` (breaking) — requires major version bump
- [ ] N/A — docs / tooling / CI only

Target schema file(s):

## Examples updated?

- [ ] Updated `examples/*.json` to demonstrate the new field / fix
- [ ] Added a new example file (path: `examples/...`)
- [ ] No example change needed (explain why):

## Backward compat verified?

- [ ] All existing `examples/*.json` still validate against `schema/cv-v1.json` (stable)
- [ ] All existing `examples/*.json` still validate against `schema/cv-v1.3-preview.json` (preview)
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] If this is a breaking change, migration notes added to `CHANGELOG.md`
